findings.title: Missing direct test for mapAbsItemToBook ebook wiring
findings.why_it_matters: Only detectFormat and VALID_FORMATS are tested. The full mapAbsItemToBook mapping (source.url format for ebooks vs audiobooks, chapters array for ebooks, totalDuration being undefined for ebooks, allow-list gating in the returned Book object) has no test coverage. A regression in the wiring would not be caught by the current tests.
evidence: Test file only imports detectFormat and VALID_FORMATS — never calls mapAbsItemToBook or verifies complete Book shape
The source.url format logic (line 212-214 in useAudiobookshelfSync.ts) is critical for ebook rendering but untested
The chapters and totalDuration ebook paths are only tested indirectly through detectFormat returning 'epub'
findings.suggested_fix: Add integration tests that call mapAbsItemToBook (or a testable wrapper) with both ebook and audiobook ABS items, asserting the full Book shape including source.url, chapters.length, and totalDuration

testing_gaps: No test verifies that the ebook source.url correctly includes /api/items/{id}/ebook
No test verifies that audiobook source.url remains the server root
No test verifies that chapters are empty for ebooks but populated for audiobooks
No test verifies that totalDuration is undefined for ebooks
